gameData.weather: 66 degrees at game time. With a breeze blowing in from center field...

result.description: Joe Bill Silver grounds into a double play, shortstop Ford Stipe to second base Nate Colbert to first base JP Primero. Manny Del Greco out at 2nd. Joe Bill Silver out at 1st.
Tiny Howl grounds into a double play, second base Nate Colbert to shortstop Ford Stipe to first base JP Primero. Manny Del Greco out at 2nd. Tiny Howl out at 1st.
Blaze Winterbottom grounds into a double play, first base JP Primero to shortstop Ford Stipe to first base JP Primero. Scooter McKeever out at 2nd. Blaze Winterbottom out at 1st.
Lamont Bradleys grounds into a double play, third base Dieter Gomez to second base Blaze Winterbottom to first base Manny Del Greco. Billy De Jesus out at 2nd. Lamont Bradleys out at 1st.
